name: MiMo-V2.5 Voice
tagline: AI voice assistant for real-time conversations
description: MiMo-V2.5 Voice is an advanced AI voice assistant designed for seamless real-time conversations and interactions. It leverages state-of-the-art speech recognition and synthesis technology to provide natural, responsive voice communication. The tool is ideal for users seeking an intelligent voice interface for productivity, accessibility, and hands-free operation across various applications.
